properties.name: gap.{{ .NameSnake }}.enabled
properties.description: Controls whether the GAP {{ .Name }} library is enabled. When disabled, auto-configuration will not be applied.

properties.name: gap.{{ .NameSnake }}.startup-logging-enabled
properties.description: Controls whether the {{ .Name }} library logs startup information. Useful for reducing log noise in production or when library is used in many microservices.

properties.name: gap.{{ .NameKebab }}-core.flyway.enabled
properties.description: Controls whether Flyway database migrations are enabled for {{ .Name }} core schema.

properties.name: gap.{{ .NameKebab }}-core.flyway.locations
properties.description: Locations of database migration scripts for {{ .Name }} core schema.

properties.name: gap.{{ .NameKebab }}-core.flyway.table
properties.description: Name of the Flyway schema history table for {{ .Name }} core migrations.

properties.name: gap.{{ .NameKebab }}-core.flyway.baseline-on-migrate
properties.description: Whether to automatically call baseline when migrate is executed against a non-empty schema.

properties.name: gap.{{ .NameKebab }}-core.flyway.validate-on-migrate
properties.description: Whether to automatically call validate when running migrate.

properties.name: gap.remote-aggregate.max-retries
properties.description: Maximum number of retries for remote aggregate event processing when aggregate is not found. After max retries, event is sent to DLQ. Prevents infinite retries when CREATED event is lost.
